images.title: Oedemera nobilis (Scopoli, 1763) Male (32720876490).png
images.description:
Family: Oedemeridae Size: 10.3 mm (8.0 to 11.0 mm) Origin: West Europe, South Europe, Western Central Europe Ecology: The larvae live in the stems and roots of herbs, the beetles sit on blossoms at forest edges Location: Corsica, Ghisonaccia, Tour de Vignale leg.det. U.Schmidt, 23.V.1973

Photo: U.Schmidt, 2017

images.title: Cyclodinus constrictus (Curtis 1838) (32541075933).png
images.description:
Family: Anthicidae Size: 2.6 mm (2.5 to 3,0 mm) Origin: Western Mediterranean, coasts of the Netherlands and England Ecology: halophylic Location: France, Corsica, Ghisonaccia, Tour de Vignale leg. U.Schmidt, 26.V.1973; det. G.Uhmann, 1974

Photo: U.Schmidt, 2017
